creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, May 31, 2007 at 15:55:32 +0800, Charlie Root wrote:
> Fix some problem with 'portlint -abct'.
> Thanks for help. You let me do better. :)
> 

Thanks.  One last thing, the port should respect NOPORTDOCS.
When NOPORTDOCS is defined, document files should not be installed.
Please do this minor fix.  Thanks in advanced!

-- 
Best Regards,
Li-Wen Hsu
